Your effort and contribution in providing this feedback is much appreciated.

#  US strikes military targets on Iran’s Kharg Island 
Published 10:37 AM EDT, Tue April 7, 2026 
[ ](mailto:?subject=CNN%20content%20share&body=Check%20out%20this%20article%3A%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fwww.cnn.com%2F2026%2F04%2F07%2Fworld%2Fvideo%2Fus-strikes-irans-kharg-island-digvid "Share with email")
Link Copied! 
![22519097 - CLEAN_USKhargIslandStri.00_00_38_03.Still001.jpg](https://www.cnn.com/media/sites/cnn/cnn-fallback-image.jpg)
Video Ad Feedback
US strikes military targets on Iran's Kharg Island 
[ ](mailto:?subject=CNN%20content%20share&body=Check%20out%20this%20video%3A%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fwww.cnn.com%2F2026%2F04%2F07%2Fworld%2Fvideo%2Fus-strikes-irans-kharg-island-digvid "Share with email")
Link Copied! 
The US struck military targets overnight on Kharg Island in Iran, according to a US official, who added the strikes did not target oil facilities. The island is key to Iranian oil exports. CNN's Jim Sciutto reports.

metadata.author: Robbie Hawken
metadata.description: The US struck military targets overnight on Kharg Island in Iran, according to a US official, who added the strikes did not target oil facilities. The island is key to Iranian oil exports. CNN’s Jim Sciutto reports.
metadata.og:description: The US struck military targets overnight on Kharg Island in Iran, according to a US official, who added the strikes did not target oil facilities. The island is key to Iranian oil exports. CNN’s Jim Sciutto reports.
metadata.og:title: US strikes military targets on Iran’s Kharg Island | CNN
